topics: Introduction to the Physics of Flow Rate and Total Flow Measurement: Volumetric Flow Rate, Mass Flow Rate, Rate of Flow Measurement, Classification of Flow Meters, Fluid Mechanics Concept Viscosity, Reynolds Number, Flow Regimes, Laminar Flow, Turbulent Flow, Transitional Flow, Law of Continuity
Linearization and Compensation of Flow Meters: Linear and Nonlinear Flow Meters
Gas Flow Pressure and Temperature Compensation

Construction and Applications of Differential Pressure Flow Meters: Venturi Meter (Types, Limitations, Pressure Tapping), Orifice Meter (Types, Pressure Taps, Limitations), Pitot Tubes (Limitations, Method of Use for Circular and Rectangular Ducts, Precautions During Installation), Dall Tube (Installation), Flow Nozzle (Different Types, Long Radius Nozzle, ISA 1932 Nozzle), Generalised Features of Differential Pressure Type Flow Meter, Installation Requirement with Differential Pressure Flow Meter, Target Flow Meter

Construction and Applications of Positive Displacement Flow Meters: Reciprocating Piston Flow Meter (2 Piston Type and 4 Piston Type), Oscillating Piston Flow Meter, Nutating Disc Flow Meter, Helix Meter, Rotating Vane Flow Meter, Oval Wheel Flow Meter
Construction and Applications of Inferential Flow Meters: Single and Multi-Jet Flow Meter, Propeller Type Flow Meter, Double Rotor Propeller Type Flow Meter, Turbine Flow Meter
Construction and Applications of Rotameter: Rotameter Basic Equation, Classification, Components, Installation

Construction and Applications of Miscellaneous Flow Meters: Electromagnetic Flow Meters, Ultrasonic Flow Meters, Vortex Shedding Flow Meters, Thermal Flow Meter, Open Channel Flow Meter (Weir Type and Parshall Flumes Type)
Gas Analyser: Thermal Conductivity Type Analyser, Heat of Reaction Method, Paramagnetic Method, Zirconia Oxygen Analyser, Electro Chemical Reaction Method, Spectroscopic Analysis
Different Types of Control Valves: Disc, Stem and Seat Design and Applications, Gate Valve
Control Valve Noise and Methods of Its Reduction: Mechanical Vibration, Aerodynamic Noise
